integration_contracts.description: Per-integration architecture decisions: protocol, sync/async pattern, auth strategy, rate limit handling, and ownership

error_handling.description: Retry policy, circuit breaker, timeout, and fallback strategy per integration boundary

acl_strategy.description: Anti-corruption layer design: translation direction, schema ownership, tolerance model for upstream schema changes

observability.description: Distributed tracing across integration boundaries, health checks, and alerting per external dependency

testing_strategy.description: Contract testing approach, integration test strategy, and how external system unavailability is tested

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements: latency per integration, availability targets, rate limit headroom

open_questions.description: Unresolved architectural ambiguities blocking the tech stack stage
